sections.paragraph:
Original: אחז

Transliteration: 'âchâz

Phonetic: aw-khawz'

BDB Definition:

Ahaz = "he has grasped"
  1. king of Judah, son Jotham, father of Hezekiah
  2. a Benjamite, son of Micah, and great grandson of Jonathan

Origin: from H270

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
